message.content:
{
  "units": [
    {
      "declaration_names": [
        "sum_pow_eq_sum_finset",
        "cancel_all_even_l1"
      ],
      "lean_file_body": "open Finset BigOperators

namespace AlgebraicCombinatorics.SubtractiveMethods

lemma sum_pow_eq_sum_finset {ι : Type*} [Fintype ι] [DecidableEq ι] {n : ℕ} (f : ι → ℤ) : 
    (∑ k : ι, f k) ^ n = ∑ (x : Fin n → ι), ∏ i : Fin n, f (x i) := by
  induction' n with m ih
  · simp
  · rw [pow_succ, ih]
    have hprod_sum : (∑ (x : Fin m → ι), ∏ i : Fin m, f (x i)) * (∑ k : ι, f k) =
        ∑ p : ((Fin m → ι) × ι), (∏ i : Fin m, f (p.1 i)) * f p.2 := by
      rw [Finset.sum_mul, Finset.sum_congr rfl (λ x hx => by rw [Finset.mul_sum]), Finset.sum_product]
    rw [hprod_sum]
    have hinj : Function.Injective (λ (p : (Fin m → ι) × ι) => Fin.snoc p.1 p.2) :=
      Fin.snoc_injective
    have hsurj : Function.Surjective (λ (p : (Fin m → ι) × ι) => Fin.snoc p.1 p.2) := by
      intro y
      refine ⟨(λ i => y (Fin.castSucc i), y (Fin.last m)), ?_⟩
      ext i
      refine Fin.cases ?_ ?_ i
      · simp
      · simp
    have hprod : ∀ (p : (Fin m → ι) × ι), (∏ i : Fin m, f (p.1 i)) * f p.2 = 
        ∏ i : Fin (m+1), f ((Fin.snoc p.1 p.2) i) := by
      intro p; rw [Fin.prod_univ_snoc]
    have h_mem : ∀ (p : (Fin m → ι) × ι), p ∈ (Finset.univ : Finset ((Fin m → ι) × ι)) := by
      intro p; exact Finset.mem_univ _
    exact (Finset.sum_bij (λ p _, Fin.snoc p.1 p.2) h_mem hinj ?_ ?_).symm
    · intro p₁ hp₁ p₂ hp₂ h_eq; exact hinj h_eq
    · intro y hy
      obtain ⟨p, hp⟩ := hsurj y
      use p
      apply Finset.mem_univ
    · intro p hp; exact hprod p

lemma cancel_all_even_l1 (n d : ℕ) : (∑ e : Fin d → ZMod 2, (∑ k : Fin d, toSign (e k)) ^ n) = 
    (∑ x : Fin n → Fin d, ∑ e : Fin d → ZMod 2, signProduct e x) := by
  calc
    (∑ e, (∑ k, toSign (e k)) ^ n) = ∑ e, ∑ x : Fin n → Fin d, ∏ i : Fin n, toSign (e (x i)) := by
      refine Finset.sum_congr rfl (λ e he => ?_)
      rw [sum_pow_eq_sum_finset (λ k => toSign (e k))]
    _ = ∑ x : Fin n → Fin d, ∑ e : Fin d → ZMod 2, ∏ i : Fin n, toSign (e (x i)) := by
      rw [Finset.sum_comm]
    _ = ∑ x, ∑ e, signProduct e x := by
      rfl

end AlgebraicCombinatorics.SubtractiveMethods",
      "notes": [
        "Proved equality via expansion of power using sum_pow_eq_sum_finset and interchange of sums."
      ],
      "status": "generated",
      "unit_key": "unit-004",
      "used_context": [
        "Finset.sum",
        "toSign",
        "signProduct",
        "Finset.sum_comm",
        "Fin.snoc_injective",
        "Fin.prod_univ_snoc",
        "Finset.sum_product",
        "Fintype",
        "Finset.mem_univ",
        "Finset.sum_mul",
        "Finset.mul_sum"
      ]
    }
  ]
}
